zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Tyldesley於1370年出生在英國藍卡爾泰爾德斯利時，他的父親Thurston de  Tyldesley30歲，母親Margaret Worsley40歲。他於大約1398年與Cecilia de   Ashton在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1434年在英國藍卡爾沃斯利享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Tyldesley于1370年出生在英国藍卡爾泰爾德斯利时，他的父亲Thurston de  Tyldesley30岁，母亲Margaret Worsley40岁。他于大约1398年与Cecilia de   Ashton在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1434年在英国藍卡爾沃斯利享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tyldesley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Tyldesley was born in 1370, in Tyldesley, Lancashire, England, his father, Thurston de  Tyldesley, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Worsley, was 40. He married Cecilia de   Ashton about 1398, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1434, in Worsley, Lancashire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Tyldesley est né en 1370, à Tyldesley, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thurston de  Tyldesley, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Worsley, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia de   Ashton environ 1398, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1434, à Worsley, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Tyldesley 1370 in Tyldesley, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thurston de  Tyldesley 30 und seine Mutter Margaret Worsley 40. Er hat um 1398 in Lancashire, England Cecilia de   Ashton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1434 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Worsley, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Tyldesley è nato il nel 1370 nel Tyldesley, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Thurston de  Tyldesley, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Worsley, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Cecilia de   Ashton circa 1398, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1434, nel Worsley, Lancashire, England, all'età di 64 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Tyldesley(이)가 1370년 영국 랭카실르 타이데슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thurston de  Tyldesley(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Worsley(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1398년 영국 랭카실르에서 Cecilia de   Ashton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1434년 영국 랭카실르 워슬리에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Cecilia de   Ashton aproximadamente 1398, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1434, em Worsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Tyldesley родился в 1370 г. в местности тилдесли, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thurston de  Tyldesley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Worsley, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia de   Ashton около 1398 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1434 г. в местности ворсли, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.
